# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
- name: compute-engine-instance
  type: compute.v1.instance
  properties:
    zone: "us-central1-a"
    machineType: f1-micro
    metadata:
      startup-script: |-
        # Install Apache web server and PHP runtime
        sudo apt-get update
        sudo apt-install -y apache2 php libapache2-mod-php
        
        # Configure virtual hosts
        sudo a2dissite 000-default
        sudo echo '<VirtualHost *:80>' | sudo tee /etc/apache2/sites-available/example.com.conf'
        sudo echo 'ServerName example.com' | sudo tee -a /etc/apache2/sites-available/example.com.conf'
        sudo echo 'DocumentRoot /var/www/html' | sudo tee -a /etc/apache2/sites-available/example.com.conf'
        sudo echo '</VirtualHost>' | sudo tee -a /etc/apache2/sites-available/example.com.conf'
        
        # Enable and restart Apache web server
        sudo a2enmod rewrite
        sudo systemctl restart apache2
    networkInterfaces:
      - network: "global/networks/default"
        subnet: "regions/us-central1/subnetworks/default"
  accessControl:
    # Allow all users with the compute.instances.attachNetworkInterface permission to attach a network interface to this instance.
    - permission: compute.instances.attachNetworkInterface
      principle: 'allUsers'
- name: cloud-sql-instance
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.instance
  properties:
    region: "us-central1"
    databaseVersion: MYSQL_5_7
    settings:
      tier: db-f1-micro
      backupConfiguration:
        enabled: true
        startTime: '09:00'
      ipConfiguration:
        authorizedNetworks:
          - value: "global/networks/default"
            name: "default"
  accessControl:
    # Allow all users with the sqladmin.instances.create permission to create a Cloud SQL instance.
    - permission: sqladmin.instances.create
      principle: 'allUsers'
- name: cloud-storage-bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    location: "US"
    storageClass: STANDARD
    bucketPolicyOnly: false
  accessControl:
    # Allow all users with the storage.buckets.create permission to create a Cloud Storage bucket.
    - permission: storage.buckets.create
      principle: 'allUsers'
- name: load-balancer
  type: compute.v1.targetPool
  properties:
    region: "us-central1"
    healthChecks:
      - httpHealthCheck:
          port: 80
          requestPath: "/"
        description: "HTTP Health Check"
  accessControl:
    # Allow all users with the compute.targetPools.create permission to create a Compute Engine target pool.
    - permission: compute.targetPools.create
      principle: 'allUsers'
